strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple roles
Proven track record in optimizing performance and scalability for high-traffic systems (e.g., millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Active contribution to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, showcasing modern tech adoption
concerns: Primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js) matches but limited evidence of Nest.js (secondary stack) usage
No explicit mention of Vitest (required testing framework) in resume; experience with Jest exists
Gaps in cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) expertise despite AWS CDK mention; Kubernetes experience is present
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack skills with TypeScript and Node.js (key primary stack), including React and MongoDB, as evidenced by roles at re:cinq and Optilyz. They also contribute to AI-agent infrastructure, aligning with modern trends. However, gaps exist in required frameworks (Nest.js, Vitest) and cloud platforms (only AWS CDK mentioned).
